message:
feat(alerts): per-alert snooze buttons + duration preset chips (#8742)

* feat(alerts): per-alert snooze buttons + duration preset chips

AlertListItem:
- Added snooze button (BellOff icon) in the quick actions row of each
  alert. Click opens a dropdown with 5m/15m/1h/4h/24h options.
- When snoozed: shows yellow badge with remaining time, click to
  unsnooze immediately. Uses the existing useSnoozedAlerts hook that
  was already implemented but not wired into the main alerts card.

AlertRuleEditor:
- Duration field: replaced raw number input with preset chips
  (Immediate / 1 min / 5 min / 15 min / 1 hour) plus a manual
  input for custom values. Users no longer need to know that
  "300" means 5 minutes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: extract duration presets to named constants (ts-null-safety)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
